SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class AlgoMessageAlert

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.AlgoMessageAlert
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class AlgoMessageAlert extends TenantBaseID implements Serializable
JPA entity for the algo_message_alert table. Stores alarm records generated by the alarm evaluation system when alert conditions on strategies or watchlist securities are triggered. Each record captures the alarm type, structured JSON details about the condition that fired, and the time of triggering. Used by both Tier 1 (event-driven simple alerts) and Tier 2 (scheduled indicator alerts).
See Also:
